error_ContainerNotDefined: Container div is not correctly defined in HTML file, check data-element attribute !
error_Css: Initialization warning: at leat one css resource file is not found !
error_Init: Initialization error: app booter resource is not found !
error_MissingOptions: Initialization options are incomplete or missing !
error_RootComponentPath: Root component path is not correctly defined in HTML file, check data-component attribute !
error_RootComponentModule: Root component is not correctly defined: component object must be exported as default !
error_LoadingModule_NoDefault: is not correclty defined: no default export !
